mediatailor.livesource.HttpPackageConfig.Description: The HTTP package configurations for the live source.

mediatailor.livesource.LiveSourceName.Description: The name that's used to refer to a live source.

mediatailor.livesource.SourceLocationNam.Description: The name of the source location.

mediatailor.livesource.Tags.Description: The tags assigned to the live source. Tags are key-value pairs that you can associate with Amazon resources to help with organization, access control, and cost tracking. For more information, see [Tagging AWS Elemental MediaTailor Resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediatailor/latest/ug/tagging.html).
